indications.text:
COMPLERA, a combination of two nucleoside analog HIV 1 reverse transcriptase
inhibitors (emtricitabine and tenofovir disoproxil fumarate) and one non-nucleoside
reverse transcriptase inhibitor (rilpivirine), is indicated for use as a complete regimen for
the treatment of HIV-1 infection in adult pat...

COMPLERA® (emtricitabine/rilpivirine/tenofovir disoproxil fumarate) is indicated for use
as a complete regimen for the treatment of HIV-1 infection in antiretroviral treatment-
naive adult patients with HIV-1 RNA less than or equal to 100,000 copies/mL at the start
of therapy.
